lastFailureSignature: hook-capture|hook-no-capture-file|Startup hook did not produce a capture file. Exit code: 0. stderr: usage: cabgen <command> [<args>] build Build the cab files. publish Publish the cab files to Azure Blob staging. rollback Rollback to last version of cab file.
lastFailureMessage:
Startup hook did not produce a capture file. Exit code: 0. stderr: usage: cabgen <command> [<args>]

    build       Build the cab files.
    publish     Publish the cab files to Azure Blob staging.
    rollback    Rollback to last version of cab file.
